response.overview: Witness SP 4449 and UP 844 double-heading for the first time in excursion service! With complete coverage of the Puget Sound Steam Special, this program includes all four days of the locomotives in action: from Portland to Tacoma, both round trips from Tacoma to Everett, and the return trip to Portland. See and hear the two 4-8-4 Northern locomotives from onboard and trackside vantage points; re-live this once in a lifetime steam event!
response.title: Legends of Steam: Volume II
